entry.title: Re: In service cloud v2, case fields are not getting upda...
entry.content:
Hi @AnujaS ,

You need to pass the x-crm-token in the header in case of a patch.

 

Simon

entry.title: SAP iRPA Outlook Email Search Criterion - how to add OR Condition
entry.content:
Hi

Is there a way to add multiple Email Search Criterias but with OR condition? Currently, if you mention 2-3 search conditions, by default it takes them as AND conditions and the search happens accordingly. 

I need to add multiple search critera, but using OR condition. Does it allow such functionality? 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Local Extensions for SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing (ICVCP3_EN_Col01)
entry.content:
For SAP-internal employees, if the learning asset link does not work, you are missing an authorization for the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support. Please utilize the Internal Edition of SAP Learning Hub

Note:  First time users will be prompted to subscribe. The subscribe button is at the bottom of the page. Once you subscribe, you will get instant access to SAP Learning Hub, internal edition.

entry.title: Whats the Mac Shortcut key equivalent to CTRL+# in Windows (to comment out multiple lines)?
entry.content:
Dear all,

as already mentioned in the headline, I am looking for the Mac equivalent of "CTRL+#" to (un-)comment multiple lines in the SAC Coding. 

Thanks in advance,
Regards,
Chris

entry.title: Re: BRF+ data Validation
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you tried maintaining the primary key fields as mandatory? Also in the table settings under the decision table, you need to select the option of unique fields only for the particular column. Hope this should work.

Snedden

entry.title: Re: Public holiday not showing on generated work schedule...
entry.content:
Confirm the validity dates of your new Holiday in the Holiday Calendar and that you have regenerated the Work Schedules of the required grouping(s).  At this stage, your new Holiday should appear in the employee's work schedule, in the DEVelopment environment.

This process has generated a Workbench transport (the Calendars) and a Customizing transport (the Work Schedules), and both these transports then have to be applied first to your QualityAndTesting and then to your PRoDuction environments.

entry.title: recreate clustered indexes on huge table
entry.content:
Dears,

we have a huge table with a clustered index and 6 non-clustered indexes, when we create this index in the past there is one of our processes -which executes on this table- took as an example about 10 minutes to complete, after a week later , the same process took about 30 minutes, even though we run update statistics on that table at midnight everyday,

kindly note that table is the most active table in the database with a lot of insert commands and also a lot off select ones (the delete operation is prevented)

Now we are thinking  to drop the clustered index and recreate it,

so my inquiries are:
If we drop it, what the affect to the non clustered indexes on the table?
as the data in the table is already sorted, what about specify sorted data while creating the index in order to speed up the time of creating it?
the current fill factor value for all indexes in that table is 0, how to calculate the best value to change to it, and what are the benefits on both insert and select commands on the table

kindly note that clustered index is composed of 3 columns

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Final Review Step in Onboarding 2.0 Process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Has anyone experience that the Document flow is not triggering after the Final review even though it is part of the process variant? What's happening to us is that the Document Flow step does not appear again after the final review changes on PDC and ADC. Meaning, any changes made after final review, do not reflect on the form and signature step is not triggered. So the form now is not updated and not in sync with the updated information.

entry.title: Archiving old SXI_MONITOR messages
entry.content:
Hello wonderful people, I need some help.

We run a multi-client setup in SAP and are approaching our storage limit.
Checked DB02 and noticed that SXMSCLUR is take taking up a HEAP of disk space.

After going through various posts on this site as well as a few forums, I couldn't find a good answer for this -
I want to DELETE all messages in SXI_MONITOR, prior to 01.01.2022
Checked in the SXMB_ADMIN under archiving, but it does not allow me to select a specific date from which the messages could be deleted.

Am I missing something obvious?

entry.title: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IMPORT for ODSO )
entry.content:
I am trying to transport a new object (ODSO) from DBW to PBW and it is not working.

The transport error message:

Start of the after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) ODSO ( )


Error when activating Objeto DataStore (clásico) ZOSIP1


Error when resetting Objeto DataStore (clásico) ZOSIP11 to the active versio

Start of the after-import method RS_RSDS_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) RSDS ( )

Start of the after-import method RS_TRFN_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) TRFN ( )

Start of the after-import method RS_ISIP_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) ISIP ( )

Start of the after-import method RS_DTPA_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) DTPA ( )
Transformation 0D1BRS9URSHLABQ2FKC0KWVG609EI3ZC inactive; action cannot be executed
Transformation 0D1BRS9URSHLABQ2FKC0KWVG609EI3ZC inactive; action cannot be executed
Error while saving Proceso transferencia datos DTP_00O2THN2VOW0AH4P6EOW2CP6K

Starting after import method RS_DTPA_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) DTPA in delete mode

Starting after import method RS_ISIP_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) ISIP in delete mode

Starting after import method RS_TRFN_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) TRFN in delete mode

Starting after import method RS_RSDS_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) RSDS in delete mode

Starting after import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) ODSO in delete mode

Starting after import method RS_ROUT_AFTER_IMPORT for object type(s) ROUT in delete mode

Summary of objects with errors from request DBWK913506
Errors occurred during post-handling RS_AFTER_IMPORT for DTPA L
The errors affect the following components:
BW-WHM-MTD (Metadata (Repository))

entry.title: Condition Contract: Accrual capping, Intercompany postings possibility
entry.content:
Hi,

I have three question for conditions contract process (Settlement Management)

1. I have requirement to put capping for accrual. e.g Accruals should not happen once a specific amount is reached. Is it possible in standard?

2. Does intercompany settlement works under condition contracts? e.g: I have three companies A, B and C. Company C is selling goods to end customer where Company A and B would receive some commission. My approach is to set up separate condition contract under agent commission for A and B. At the time of settlement Company C will issue the settlement document but at the same time company  A and B should also post the incoming document against the company C settlement document like Intercompany supplier invoice happens with IDOC.

3. There is requirement that customer would issue and debit memo for rebate amount and system should post that incoming document against the condition contract as settlement document.is it possible?

entry.title: Integrating Standard Cost Estimate in Margin Analysis CO-PA using Report Painter (KE30)
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

How to flow Standard Cost Estimate(Sale Order Cost Estimate) in CO-PA Margin Analysis by using report painter KE35 and KE31 T Code.

I have added a cost element in the report painter form that is assigned to the cost component structure but the cost does not flow, how is possible.

entry.title: Re: Import Preconfigured Analytics Stories in IBP
entry.content:
Dear customer,

unfortunately the option is currently not available. It is only possible to get the Preconfigured Analytics Stories with creating a planning area by copying the sample planning area SAPIBP1.

Best regards
Yvonne
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How do I map T162S-FAUS1 and FAUS2 values to their respective fields
entry.content:
Dear all

I think i found a way to map table T162 with the field labels but i'm stuck with the table indicator nr (see under) - but already a first step forward

table T162Y: Groups: Field Selection  ==> extract to excel

 

Table T162X: Description of Field Groups from T162/T162K ==> extract to excel

For each line you will have a position nr and a group nr. There's also a table indicator (1,2 or3) nr to take into account later on.

so exemple: field label "Plant" belongs to group '01' - group 01 in table T162Y is from selection group 'Basic Data, Item'

and is the first position from FAUST1

Extract T162 data to excel, this must be done correctly meaning that you will have 5 types of characters:

 -  .  *  +  and a space

From sheet1 copy column with field keys and FAUST1 to new sheet, paste

go to first free cell next to values and apply excel formula: =MID(E1;SEQUENCE(1;LEN(E1));1)

E1 =  cell containing the data

copy FAUST2 on the right of last column and proceed the same way with the excel formula.

do the same for the other columns

the excel formula will split the value and put each character in a separate column

give a sequence number to each column, not to the faust columns if you didn't delete them,

Notice that if a field from table T162 is empty you will have an error #Calc!, that's ok

with vlookup formula lookup the sequence nr you added in table T162X and apply for each sequence nr.

You will get the field label for each position. 

My issue: 

There's  'table indicator nr'  in T162X. (FAUTB) with value 1 - 2 - 3.

That indicator can a same position but for another group and field label

eg:

table ind nr 1  - pos 01 - description: plant - grp 01: basic data, item

table ind nr 3  - pos 01 - description: supplier - grp 20: basic data

for indicator 2 no link created to a grp 

any help?

Kind regards

Nicolas

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.3: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.3 is now available. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is based on the technical product SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

To access the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

For further formats and languages of the What's New information, as well as pre-filtered views, please use the following SAP S/4HANA Cloud Help Portal page.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.3 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access the Product Assistance in multiple languages.

For you as a customers, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.3 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

entry.title: Re: How to enable an OData V4 service for anonymous access?
entry.content:
Nice Blog @Andre_Fischer . thanks for sharing.

One small note here, the Alias name in the URL in your blog is ZODATAV4, but the screenshots shows ZODATAV4_2, which is bit confusing.

Question:

Did I understood correctly that even for publishing multiple Odata V4 services over internet/intranet without any authentication requirement for the consuming client, we just need to add those services in that specific PFCG role assigned to that service user? and no need to create a new ZODATAV4*** Alias node for each Odata V4 service. is that right?

Another question : This Alias is like a hidden gem in SICF which only few consultants in the project will know about. so will SAP introduce a standard Alias to make this concept more generic in the near future?

Regards,

Bharat Bajaj

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Visual Inspection Process in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Nicely  written , many new things  in this - Superb.

Br,

dsk

entry.title: Re: SAP Field service management to BW/4Hana
entry.content:
Hi @dirk_meyer2,

From Datasphere's point of view, the supported source connections are listed here:
Integrating Data via Connections. There is no mention of FSM specifically.

I suggest checking FSM's documentation about how FSM exposes data, looking for some generic ways like: Generic JDBC, Generic OData API, Cloud Data Integration, Open Connectors.

BR.

entry.title: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using Inline frame
entry.content:
Hello All,

i am trying to add an external URL in one of the SAP Build apps using Inline Frame . So i am trying to add the URL in src properties but i am a blank screen while previewing the app in Web.

 

Please guide how to embed the URL.

entry.title: Re: ME51N check availability button
entry.content:
When create purchase requisition with item category ' ' or purchase requisition with item category 'U' by t-code ME51N, Click button "availability" in source of supply tab, the system doesn't have any response and doesn't display availability. Could you solved this problem. can you explain reason why no response.

 STO PR

standard PR

thank you

entry.title: Re: Can we change Customer Pricing Procedure (01) during...
entry.content:
Hi dear colleague,

In your case I think that the Modular Pricing Procedures for Automatic Inclusion of Price Conditions may solve your and fits to your requirement. Ill just provide a short explanation from a documentation and a link for it. please check if this approach is possible to be implemented in your case.

Modular Pricing Procedures for Automatic Inclusion of Price Conditions

You can use this function if you plan to set up pricing procedures that can be divided into a common part, that is valid across different business processes or areas, and a specific part, that is valid for specific business transactions. For this purpose, you can define either a main procedure that covers the common part and multiple subprocedures that reflect the specific parts, or the other way around.

 
Example

  • Business example 1: In a sell-from-stock process, the calculation of the net price can be the same for several countries/regions, but the conditions for tax determination differ.

  • Business example 2: Different sales organizations have different pricing strategies, for example regarding discounts, but the condition for tax determination is the same.

Kindly reach out more in the following links;
Modular Pricing Procedures for Automatic Inclusion of Price Conditions | SAP Help Portal
Automatic Inclusion of Price Conditions Using Modular Pricing Procedures | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Julio Cesar

entry.title: Re: Payroll error (No entry in table T512W for key 99 2LE...
entry.content: In table T512W, 99 is the Country Code while 2LEP would be your Wage Type, and the message indicates that WT does not exist on June 30 2023 (30062023).  Such an error referencing County Code 99 usually happens when one of the employee's infotype is incorrectly linked to CC 99 or when the employee's assignment is incorrectly assigned to CC99 in a Feature.

entry.title: availability button no response in me51n
entry.content:
Dear expert:

       When create purchase requisition with item category ' ' or purchase requisition with item category 'U' by t-code ME51N, Click button "availability" in source of supply tab, the system doesn't have any response and doesn't display availability. Could you please check availability function. how can show this function of availability in source of supply tab, Require which setting in system.  Screenshot as below:

STO PR

thank you

entry.title: Brand New GUY
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

                        You could say I'm brand new to this. My need is help with everything. I'm trying to figure out how to use Developersap.com but having great difficulties with it. Just trying to figure this out was a nightmare for me. I didn't give up and just kept pushing buttons and got here hopefully this is the right place. You could say I live in the New Orleans area because if I told you the town you would have no idea. Would like some friendly help about to get me started or pointed in the right directions. Thank you to all who read this and are willing to help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Business Intelligence Statement of Direction – May 2024 update
entry.content:
@EricFenollosa 
thank you very much for this summary 👍

One question regarding SAC:

I assume, you are aware that there are still several (important) gaps when you compare the features of the New model vs. the Classic model and the Optimized Story Experience vs the Classic Design.

Is there a dedicated roadmap to close all these gaps?

It feels like a never-ending story of "newly developed tools" which will never reflect all the capabilities the "legacy" tools offered. This is really sad. 😪

Only one small example out of hundreds: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/301001 ... from an end user perspective we don't understand why such "small things" obviously cause so huge changes?!

I think I'm speaking for the whole SAC community: Please focus on closing the gaps inside SAC and while doing this update these Influence requests to reflect the progress of long-desired features.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: How to check the connectivity to your backend system in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi @banafshehalin 

Do you remember how did you find out about the problem about the on premise git url? Maybe checking the logs of the Cloud Connector

I'm getting the same error and I cannot find the source of the problem. I have 3 btp subaccounts and only happens in one of them.

Thank you,

Eva.

entry.title: System Fields Clearing after Document Add/Update
entry.content: I am experiencing an issue with fields in SAP B1 randomly clearing upon adding/updating new marketing documents.  I've seen it with the "Remarks Field", "Customer Ref. No." field, and different addresses under the "Ship-To" field on the logistics tab. Has anyone run into this before? I keep looking back at documents and realizing information is missing. Unfortunately it is quite random and I can't repeatedly replicate it.

entry.title: Replicating Opt-Outs from external webforms to Marketing Cloud (via CPI Integration)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have a question/issue in concern of replicating Opt-Outs from external webforms to SAP Marketing Cloud through CPI:

Background:
In our SMC multiple contacts exist with the same mail-address. Currently we are still using SAP MC Forms for the Opting-Out-process. If an Opt-Out for Email is submitted via these forms the optout will be saved in all of the contacts that have the corresponding mail-address based on the technical origin email.

Due to some technical problems in past, we want to be independent on these SMC Opt-Out forms, so that’s why we created an Iflow in CPI. The purpose was that an Opt-Out form now also can be created externally. The provider of this form only needs to send the necessary data to CPI like:
- Mail-address
- Marketing Area
- And a trigger which is responsible for the Opt-Out

Due to our Iflow in CPI the Opt-Out permission is saved in the contact in SMC with the corresponding mail address. This was already successfully tested from our side.

But:
If multiple contacts exist with the same mail-address we receive the following message in SMC import monitor:
“Multiple contacts found for ID EMAIL …”, see screenshot:


Now our question is: Do you know how we can solve this issue? We have to ensure, that this Opt-Out integration also works properly in case of multiple contacts with same mail-address.

Additional information: We are using the following API for this integration:
API_MKT_CONTACT

Thank you and kind regards
Sören

entry.title: System Monitoring metric "age of oldest bgRFC queue" how to check which is the bgRFC affected
entry.content:
SAP Solution Manager allows to run monitoring for bgRFC (Background Remote Funtion Call), 4 different metrics are provided:

  • Age of oldest bgRFC queue
  • Number of bgRFC queues
  • Number of bgRFC queues in error state
  • Number of bgRFC queues older than 1 day

Focusing on Age of oldest bgRFC queue, when data is retrieved in System Monitoring you will see only the numeric value in seconds for the oldest bgRFC, but running check data collection you will see a text indicating the corresponding bgRFC:

system monitoring bgRFC

With this information you can access corresponding Managed System, execute transaction SBGRFCMON and search for corresponding entry:

sbgrfcmon checks

entry.title: Re: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content: Have you tried using the .NET SDK and the steps described at https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-clients-dot-net-core.html ?  Note that the steps are slightly different depending on the platform you are on Windows vs Linux as is the download link from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#hanatools as you will need the appropriate client for Windows, macOS, or Linux.

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Integrate SAP API Management with 3rd party IDP for SAML/JWT/OAuth based Authentication
entry.content:
Hello @former_member54417 and @ajmaradiaga 

First of all, thanks for the really good content. We are actually facing a really similar scenario to the one explained here ( SNOW with SSO with Idp Azure Ad ) consumes a S4 on premise SOAP service via and API proxy exposed in SAP APIM. In our case we want to propagate the identity of the SNOW user to SAp S4. I have seen your video and presenation and it is good, but could you please give me more information about the policies you are using in SAP APIM?

From Azure Snow gets a SAML assertion as result of identification and I guesss we have to send this to SAp PIM, interchange there it for other kind of token generated in SAp PAIM and valdated by S4, right? we are using Cloud Connector too.

Can you tell me more information about what are the policies we have to use and how?please

Thanks

Jorge

entry.title: Re: Adding S4/HANA on-premise as source system in Identity provisioning service
entry.content: you have to assign "connectivity" service quota to directory as well if your subaccount is under directory, otherwise assign connectivity quota to subaccount, and subscribe to the service. create destinations to your backend systems in same subaccount where connectivity service is subscribed.

entry.title: Re: Common questions and scenarios in Higher Duty or Temporary Assignment
entry.content: @prasi55 That worked.  Thank you for fixing the link.

BR

entry.title: Re: Content Studio - Form Performance Reporting
entry.content:
Hello Bradly,

the corresponding CDS View is "I_MKT_ContentPageFormResult"
For field "ContentPageFormResultEvent" you need to use the correct value for the following KPIs:

OPEN Views
SUBMIT Submissions
SUBMIT_RATE Submissions / Views
NEW_CONTACTS New Contacts
NEW_CONTACTS_RATE New Contacts / Submissions

Br,
Jan

entry.title: Re: Business Technology Platform (BTP) Solution Diagrams & Icons - As seen at TechEd

I am not able to access the video link provided, please grant the access. 

Thanks,

Mainak

entry.title: Where is explained the Integration Center functions (operations) ?
entry.content:
Integration Center comes with a set of operations : 

 

  • Concatenate/Append

  • To Upper Case

  • To Lower Case

  • Truncate

  • Trim Whitespace

  • Remove All

  • Replace All

  • Prepend Text

  • Truncate from Left

  • Truncate from Right

  • Substring

  • Split

However, there is no explanation for them in the documentation : 

Available Operations Based On Calculated Field Data Types | SAP Help Portal

I would like to split email address in 2 fields : 

user for the section before @

domain for the section after @

I'm unclear weather i should use split or substring

entry.title: Re: Can CPI return the response in.txt format?
entry.content: Json format

entry.title: Re: Can CPI return the response in.txt format?
entry.content:
Just add a content modifier step at the end of your flow, and set the Content-Type header to text/plain.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Error loading Fiori Application - App could not be opened
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

we are getting an error while opening one Fiori App in FLP. App is exposed to Workzone via content federation, and was working previously. This is not a BTP custom App, but a UI5 app from S4HanaOnPremise, and from 3rd party. 
Same App is working in Test system. I checked the ICF / Odata services, also Autorisation, and everything seems to be fine. 
Has anyone experience something similar, and was able to resolve it? 

 

thanks,

Imtiaz

entry.title: Re: SAP UI5 Application to Pass User ID on headers to ext...

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Getting data field from Action response using Decisio...
entry.content:
The solution that worked for me was to request that the user management application return the response as a list (array list) and not list of arrays. The action project response list are then passed into the BPA send mail. List are acceptable in send mail in BPA. This solved the need to use extra application for scripting purpose.

Thank you.

entry.title: LMs Story Tables
entry.content:
Does anyone know of a resource that helps interpret the vast amount of LMS tables in Stories. I can't find anything that defines what all the LMS tables in Stories do. The tables are very different to the ones used in Report Designer (which I don't have access to) so can't rely on them for guidance.

Any help would be appreciated.

 

Thanks

entry.title: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

in SAC, the data that is copied from actual to FC version should be extrapolated.

Example:

Actual were copied into FC version until February. The extrapolation was carried out from March to December, based on average of Actual.

The number of copied ACTUAL months is entered in the popup. The variable is used to calculate the average.

The following formula is used:

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Z_S4_HSL"

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/StartDate] TO [d/Version].[p/EndDate]

VARIABLEMEMBER #DATE OF [d/Date]

//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

// Calculate Average of ActualValue

DATA([d/Measures] = "Z_S4_HSL",[d/Date] = #DATE) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Z_S4_HSL") / %ZMM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL%

// Calculate FC Extrapolated

IF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 2 THEN

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(10, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(9, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(8, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(7, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(6, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(5, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(4, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(3, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(2, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

ELSEIF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 3 THEN

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(9, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(8, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(7, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(6, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(5, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(4, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(3, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(2, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

ELSEIF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 4 THEN

……..

The formula repeats until month 12 is reached

ELSEIF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 12 THEN

DATA( [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/EndDate]) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

ENDIF

Does anyone have any ideas on how the formula could be made simpler?

Thank You!

Marm

entry.title: Re: C4C Odata Console clear value
entry.content:
Hi,

I was having the same issue. It seems to be a problem with the C4C odata.

In postman, it works fine.

You just have to set the string empty using patch method.

Example:

{

"City ": ""

}

entry.title: How to create Mass Output Condition records in Sales and Billing output ( Vv11 and VV31) in SAP S/4
entry.content:
Hi I am looking for solution how can we create 2000 Sales output condition records in Sales and Biling document ( VV11 and VV31 ) in SAP system

I tried LSMW but LSWM is not available in SAP S/4 , so looking for alternative and Standard solution to create mass Output condition records for Sales /Billing document in SAP S/4.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Oracle 19c database upgrade of SAP system
entry.content:
Hi @steven_foo 

The ORACLE CLIENT 12.1 V5 is compatible with ORACLE DATABASE 19c, so if you have already that version installed, no preliminar activity is needed

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP subaccount trial Login Error
entry.content:
Hi @kaidehmann Kai,

Thanks for your quick response and the solution.

I have reset the password and successfully logged in to the BTP Cockpit trial account. Now I got the message 'You have been successfully logged on' from the web browser but in the  #ECLIPSE, it shows 'You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during the Service Instance logon. Please ensure that you have a user for the Service Instance.'

Furthermore, I deleted the Service key and instance which I created earlier, as advised in the following blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-btp-abap-environment-and-adt-troubleshooting-guide/ba-p/13527967. But, it wasn't successful again I encountered the same error.

Could you please guide me on how to proceed further on this case.

Best wishes,

Aravindhan

entry.title: Re: API doubts with SFAPI user to extract employee´s goal...
entry.content: Sorry, solved. Was the "User search" permission. Marked and it works.

entry.title: Re: Reverse Document Posted in QA11
entry.content:
Hi HermanAlkemade,

This solution does not work for me because I have a inspection lot with 2.000 units, and then I issued a quantity of 40 units in Return Delivery (in QA11), divided into three documents (with quantities of 10, 20, and 30 respectively), which generated three 122 movements.

Now I need to reverse the 122 movement that has a quantity of 20, but it is not possible. It can only be done with the SAP note, but when executed, it reverses all three movements.

If i execute the movement 322 or 349, the stock entry is never associated with the inspection lot for which the 122 was issued.

Tanks for the help but in this case does not solve my problem.

Best regards,

entry.title: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content: I would like Define Storage Bin Structure like on screen but still I have error message. Please for advice how I should resolve the problem.

entry.title: Re: Replication flow in DataSphere not showing the extrac...
entry.content:
Hello @vinaylohakare 
I think it is difficult to understand where exactly you cannot see the CDS Views.
Could post screenshots:
a) of the "validation message" or your source system connection? I assume it is S4 on Prem?

b) of the search screen of CDS Views in the Repl. Flow?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to connect to Shared HDI Container i...
entry.content:
Try Map an SAP HANA Database to another Environment Context | SAP Help Portal. This is the easiest way.

The new environment context is your test space. Once HANA is configured with your test space as another environment context, you can create HDI containers in HANA just like you did in dev space. There is no need for any special handling. 

Warning: If HANA was created using old Cloud Foundry environment tooling and not with the Mutienvironment tooling, you will need to switch to the new tooling.

entry.title: Re: How to create Mass Output Condition records in Sales...
entry.content: Old fashioned SAP Gui scripting?

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: Thanks for the reply MKreitlein.

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: I have uploaded a screenshot of the error. "transport error.png"

entry.title: Re: How Carve-Outs can help in your journey to SAP S/4HANA (Part V)
entry.content: Thanks for this introduction, The migration to HANA was interesting. Now looking at the SAP migration suite.

entry.title: Re: Archiving old SXI_MONITOR messages
entry.content:
SAP have an ARCHIVE object already available to store the messages on disc and then delete them from the DB.

To configure it use the T-CODE "SARA" and the object name is "BC_XMB". The procedure (short list) is:

  • configure an external (local or remote) repository to store the files (T-CODE "FILE")
  • create job to export the messages to the repository
  • create job to delete from the DATABASE after successful export

Please look onto this link.

entry.title: "Option loop" in a report custom function
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a larger formula code from a 3rd party supplier I use in a normal CR formula. This works well.
This formula contains the line "Option Loop 10000000".
According to you help : "The Option loop statement can be used to specify the maximum number of loop condition evaluations per evaluation of a formula. This statement should only be used when the default maximum loop count of 100,000 is not sufficient for the given formula."

Now I need to move this formula code inside a new report custom function like this:

Function ieIDAutomationFontEncoderQR (DataToEncode As String) As String
Option Loop 10000000
...

In this case the syntax check returns "A statement is required here".

PS. I'm using CR 2020 SP4 P1

Any workaround?

Thanks.
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: Unfortunately I don't speak Spanish... and you did not expand all the [+] lines! 😞

entry.title: Details related to Factory Calendar Endpoint in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

As a newcomer to S4 HANA Public Cloud, I am currently navigating through the platform with the aim of locating the 'Maintain Holiday Calendar' option. Unfortunately, I have been unsuccessful in my attempts to find it. My objective is to access the data from the Holiday Calendar through an API for integration with my BTP CAP Application.

Could anyone guide me on how to achieve this or point me in the direction of relevant documentation or resources?

In API Accesslator HUB, I found this option as CDS Views - Holiday Calendar

 

Regards,

Rahul Jain

entry.title: S4 Hana - Quality certificate + CV01N Process
entry.content:
Hi Gurus

I created quality certificate & mapped the same using CV01N & data is getting saved but the problem is when we open CV03N - under Quality certificate tab I am not able to see the certificate mapped.

Explored DC10 also but unable to see the data.

Thanks in Advance.

Vignesh V

entry.title: PO accruals with prepayments - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

We received the question from our customer about how to handle PO accruals with prepayments. 

What is the best practice to use when for example a PO is created for a certain service and 10% of the PO is paid before the GR is posted or the invoice comes in. 

Thank you for your input in advance! 

Kind regards,

Vanessa

entry.title: SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Some helpful sources on the topic of SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP)

SAP Help Portal
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp

SAP Business Technology Platform resource center
https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/resources.html

SAP BTP Guidance Framework
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-guidance-framework/guidance-framework/what-is-sap-btp-guidance-framework

SAP BTP Developer's Guide
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/btp-developers-guide/what-is-btp-developers-guide 

SAP BTP Learning Journeys
https://learning.sap.com/products

SAP Community
https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+Business+Technology+Platform/pd-p/73555000100700000172 

Have fun learning, trying and using it!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,

I am a SAP EWM Consultant expertise in both Sourcing and procurement with 2.3 years of professional IT experience I Identify as a person for the certification C_S4EWM which will boost my career, level of expertise and confidence. Identifying as a member of below categories

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location
  • First generation college students
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Hopefully you will consider my profile for the free certification attempt and with reference to step 2 please send the registration link.

Thanks & Regards,

NiteeshGadhireddy.

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: Sorry... Check it again, please. It is in english and expanded. Thanks MKreitlein!!

entry.title: Crystal Report Password
entry.content:
Good morning, how are you?  I am trying to update a report that was created before I took over and I need to update the dates and change from calendar year to fiscal year.

Can anyone assist me with this?

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Fiori development newsletter May 2024 (issue #28)
entry.content:
What a great time to be in software development! AI is rapidly changing the application development landscape and I’m excited to see new generative AI capabilities appearing across our portfolio. SAP Fiori tools recently added the ability to generate apps from a business requirement document. You can access this and many more cool AI tools in SAP Build Code. This issue focuses on these and other innovations, as well as a sneak peak about what you can expect to see at Sapphire.

If you want to meet with fellow developers and the SAP engineers who build our professional development tools, I encourage you to join our monthly SAP Fiori elements and SAP Fiori tools roundtable group.

Our next meeting is June 12, 2024.

Learn about the group at https://blogs.sap.com/2021/07/31/peer-to-peer-learning-at-the-sap-fiori-elements-and-sap-fiori-tools...
You can also email me if you would like an invitation.

Was this forwarded to you? Subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter.

Your editorial team, 
Peter, Oliver, and Raz

Development News

 

Sapphire 2024 user experience and application development sessions

Here is a list of sessions that highlight user experience and application development, both of which contain varying levels of AI, as SAP is infusing artificial intelligence into most of our solutions.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sapphire-2024-user-experience-and-application-development-sessions/ba-p/13684064

SAP Fiori tools 2403 introduces Gen AI capability and more

The latest enhancements in SAP Fiori tools introduce many exciting features aimed at streamlining the development process and fostering greater collaboration across teams. We have added new generative AI capabilities to create SAP Fiori elements apps directly from a business requirement document.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-tools-2403-introduces-gen-ai-capability-and-more/ba-p/13650594

Unlocking efficiency and simplicity: a look into the new features of SAP Fiori elements for OData V4

The post explains the new functionalities and improvements from SAPUI5 Version 1.121 and SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/unlocking-efficiency-and-simplicity-a-look-into-the-new-features-of-sap/ba-p/13645297

Building and delivering AI solutions for both developers and end-users in SAP S/4HANA Public Edition

This post shows a sneak preview of some of the AI initiatives we are working on for both application developers and end users. Some are roadmap items that may or may not turn into productive solutions.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/building-and-delivering-ai-solutions-for-both-developers-and-end-users-in/ba-p/13699945

ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 available now

ABAP remains an important part of the SAP development landscape. The ABAP Cloud Developer Trial is pre-configured with SAP Fiori launchpad, SAP Cloud Connector, backend / frontend connections, roles, and sample applications.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2022-available-now/ba-p/13598069

Embracing TypeScript in SAPUI5 development

SAP officially announced TypeScript support for UI5 starting with version 1.116.0. This post explains how this fits into creating SAP Fiori applications.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/embracing-typescript-in-sapui5-development/ba-p/13675744

Upgrade SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code

Now you can migrate an existing SAP Business Application Studio instance to SAP Build Code. This post explains how.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrade-sap-business-application-studio-to-sap-build-code/ba-p/13661500

Create a full-stack app using Joule

This step-by-step post shows how to create one full-stack application for management orders based on a model from the Northwind service. It uses Joule to enhance the app and generate some test scripts.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/create-full-stack-app-use-entity-drafts-use-joule-to-create-action-code/ba-p/13676527

Unlocking full-stack potential using SAP Build Code - part 1

This post shows how to create a simple CAP and UI app using Joule and deploy it to the BTP subaccount. It explains how to test, create a managed app router configuration, and access the UI and service endpoints successfully.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/unlocking-full-stack-potential-using-sap-build-code-part-1/ba-p/13667300

SAP Build Code - speed up your development with generative AI assistant – Joule

This post explains SAP Joule and how it can be used to generate application logic, data models, SAP Fiori apps, test scripts, sample data, service definitions and more.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-code-speed-up-your-development-with-generative-ai-assistant-joule/ba-p/13660954

Custom data as table, CDS, domain, business object and all that jazz...

The need for custom data is nothing new, but customizing while keeping a core clean is. Key User and on-stack Developer Extensibility provide many options. This post showcases each option relating to having your own "custom data" in SAP S/4HANA, with some pros and cons and when to use which option.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/custom-data-as-table-cds-domain-business-object-and-all-that-jazz/ba-p/13660397

Building low-code extensions with Key User Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA and SAP Build

Key users can make certain changes in SAP systems that can reduce the workload for developers. They can adapt SAP applications and services using low-code tooling that’s built into SAP S/4HANA.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/building-low-code-extensions-with-key-user-extensibility-in-sap-s-4hana-and/ba-p/13675437

Unleashing AI magic: building full-stack apps with SAP Build Code

See how to build two different full stack applications with just a few clicks and prompts.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/unleashing-ai-magic-building-full-stack-apps-with-sap-build-code/ba-p/13652771

Joule for freestyle SAPUI5 development in SAP Build Code

Joule helps write freestyle SAPUI5 code in SAP Build Code. Ask Joule by typing code-related requests, in natural language, into Joule's chat window. For example, you could ask Joule to insert a control to a view, add an event handler to a controller, introduce a full new view with routing and much more. This post summarizes some of the key capabilities.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-for-freestyle-sapui5-development-in-sap-build-code/ba-p/13650005

Our latest roadmaps are available 

SAPUI5 roadmap
SAP Fiori elements roadmap
SAP Business Application Studio roadmap
SAP Fiori tools roadmap

Developer Tutorials 

 

New Tutorial: Key User Adaptation for SAPUI5 applications

To extend SAPUI5 applications, SAPUI5 Flexibility offers capabilities not only for developers but also for key users and end users using simple visual / WYSIWYG tools..

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-tutorial-mission-key-user-adaptation-for-sapui5-applications/ba-p/13639694

Tutorial: SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects in SAP Business Application Studio are not new. But what is new is the support for SAP S/HANA Cloud. This enables developers to enhance SAPUI5 applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with comprehensive features that were previously exclusive to on-premise customers. See this blog post linking to an extensive, end-to-end tutorial:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extending-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-using-sapui5-adaptation-projects/ba-p/13607813

Developing and extending SAP Fiori elements apps openSAP course

https://open.sap.com/courses/fiori-ea1

Developer Events 

 

UI5con and reCAP coming in June

The community conferences around UI5 and CAP are coming back in 2024. See the announcements on UI5con and reCAP.

https://openui5.org/ui5con/germany2024/

https://recap-conf.dev/

https://abapconf.org/

These three events together form CodeConnect 2024, which starts the week of June 3.

https://code-connect.dev/

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensions with SAP Build best practices: an expert roundtable podcast

In this blog adapted from the podcast “SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensions with SAP Build best practices: an expert roundtable”, SAP experts discuss SAP S/4HANA extensibility best practices.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-extensions-with-sap-build-best-practices-an-expert/ba-p/13656552

SAP Fiori Innovation Days - coming later in 2024

Please mark your calendar for the next SAP Fiori Innovation Day events.

Chicago - August 13

Paris - November 19

We will share details and registration information in an upcoming newsletter

 

Back issues from the past year

SAP Fiori development newsletter #27 (March 2024)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #26 (January 2024)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #25 (November 2023)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #24 (September 2023)

SAP Fiori development newsletter #23 (July 2023)

entry.title: Re: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content:
Hello @dawid90 

  • Template - fill all remaining white spaces with Cs
  • Increment - remove "-" / dash, it should be 01 01

Something like that:

It should work then.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: It looks a bit strange ... the line containing the DSO activation is not visible in your log... only one about DSO deletion?! Did you delete it or not? Might be the issue occurs since you need to remodel the DSO via t-code RSCNV_MONITOR ... before you can re-activate it? Have a look there.

entry.title: Re: BW HANA Sizing - Results interpretation /SDF/HANA_BW_...
entry.content:
Hi Roland, thanks for your notes. I would be curios to know your point of view on what is stated in the document SAPBW4HANA_Sizing_V2.7.pdf, in note 2296290. Page 36:

1. The size of the data files will be approximately as large as the overall memory requirement.

2. Small systems (< 512 GB) require half the memory size for log files. For all other systems a
total of 512 GB for log files should be enough.

3. For executables, dumps, exports, etc. we recommend reserving at least 2x-3x the total
memory requirement.

Which in my example would be:
1. 838 Memory requirement + 838 for data = 1676
2. 1676 + 512 = 2188
3. 2188 + (838 x 2) = 3864,

Which would leads to a Hana DB tier of at least XL (3072 GB). Meaning once size bigger than the recommendation of 2 TB. Would you agree that the recommended physical memory of the report is not sufficient and the above needs to be considered? Or not at all?

entry.title: Re: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using...
entry.content:
Hello there,

It might very well happen that the external url that you are trying import requires javascript to show the content (e.g. Figma file, or Zoom call). However, the inline Frame in Build Apps is a 'sandboxed' environment, so you have to specify which capabilities do you wish to allow. 

Read about it more here: 
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/iframe#sandbox

PS, make sure to check the 'size' of the inline frame is being set, else it will default to the 300x150 sizing, which might not be the desired size. I strongly suggest using percentage values, or if it is a page-wide iframe, then the 'viewport.width' system variable.

entry.title: Re: Replication flow in DataSphere not showing the extrac...
entry.content:
Hello @MKreitlein, Thanks for your reply.

Datasphere - New Replication flow

We select the Source Connection as "S4HANA (On Premise)" followed by Source Container as "CDS - CDS Views".

Finally when we go to "Add Source Object" we do not see the ABAP CDS view enabled for extraction like I_PRODUCT (as seen below).

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: Re: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content:
Great It's working.

Please explain why you put at the end in Template eight "C". What is the dependency?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @Suzanne_Heiob,

I certainly agree with this development for keeping our certifications up-to-date. Great move!

What about those of us who don’t have the resources to pay for an annual Learning Hub subscription but want to keep our certifications current and not expire prematurely?

Thanks, Simon

entry.title: Re: Sales & Service Cloud - Intelligent Sales Add-on – 2402 features
entry.content: I have purchased the license for "SAP Sales and Service Core, intelligent sales add-on" my question is the following, in the workspace you can have "contracts" just as you have "sales quote, products, sales team members"

entry.title: Re: Performance indicator with KP* ID's are not available...
entry.content:
Good day, 

unfortunately, there is currently no connection between SAP Signavio Process Insights performance indicators and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence metrics. They are conceptually very similar, but not the same. It is not possible to map the performance indicators from SAP Signavio Process Insights to SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

Best regards,

Katie

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Extraction Filter for M2S JCDS
entry.content: Niels, in the second screenshot, JCDS 16.05.2024 ERROR in Preview, the error is that the extraction returned no data. This isn't a true error because the extraction ran successfully; however, the filter is too restrictive, and no rows were returned. Can you confirm the column, objnr, has records that start with the characters 'OR' with screenshots please?

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (St Leon-Rot, DE)
entry.content: @qmacroany more information available 🙂 ?

entry.title: Re: How to change the color of a custom field via scripti...
entry.content:
Hi @queen_sissi ,

You have two options to achieve the target:

  1. If the custom field access level is Read-Only, you can include HTML tag in the field value. CPQ UI supports parsing the HTML tag when rendering the UI.
  2. Customizing Responsive Template is an alternative way to do it at purely UI level.

Best Regards
Fancy

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Cross Entity Rules
entry.content:
Hello, Could you please confirm if it is possible to use Work Permit Info portlet as the source of the change? There's no "Insert New Record" option, only "Edit option" to save new data into the portlet. Would then the business rule trigger a change of other object, e.g. in the Job Information portlet?

Thank you. BR, Martina

entry.title: Re: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using...
entry.content:
Hi Mithaly,

I am trying to add a Datadog link in src section to display the values .Does it require javascript to open the URL and display the content on same page ?

entry.title: Re: Cross Landscape Distribution - Focused Build Standalone Extensions Part 1
entry.content:
Wizard based distribution can only distribute 2 one target after each other...you would need to finish it for one target and then start the wizard again for the next target. Thats by design because in the wizard you can only select one target CD/Transport.

Automatic Distribution will execute both...still one after each other but you only need to trigger it once.

entry.title: Re: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content:
@dawid90 

The template can contain only C, N, A characters. They stand for:

  • C - constant character common for all the bins
  • N - numer
  • A - letter

That is what your error message says. The template mustn't contain space characters. So even if a bin number contains a space, you need to put C in the template at that place.

entry.title: Re: UI adapt using SAP BAS
entry.content: what is your app? fiori element based?

entry.title: Credit check Key Figures.
entry.content:
What are the jobs to update the payment key figures in SAP Credit Management.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Credit check Key Figures.
entry.content:
Refer the help documentation.

How the Key Figures in Credit Management Are Calculated help portal link 

 

We use job templates Send Delta of Payment Behavior Summary help portal link  

or, the job Recreate Payment Behavior Summary help portal link 

Also, the job temaplate Update Payment Behavior Key Figures help portal link  

 

The usage of the these above jobs in explained in the document "How the Key Figures in Credit Management Are Calculated"

 

Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Adopt the Group Financial Statements Review Booklet to your own reporting needs
entry.content:
Adopt the Group Financial Statements Review Booklet to your own reporting needs

We have recently released a video in a blog to showcase the powerful capabilities of the Group Financial Statements review booklet. In this video we've illustrated how our standard Group Financial Statements Review Booklet works and how it helps to ease the stress of the financial close related reporting tasks. 

Are you a key user in your organization? Have you ever wished you could tailor the Group Financial Statements Review Booklet to suit your business's specific needs? If that sounds like you, then you're in the right place! In this blog, we'll walk you through a step-by-step guide on how you can craft your very own personalized Review Booklet using our innovative Review Booklet Designer.

1. Open “Manage KPI and Reports” application

2. Navigate to the tab “Review Booklet"

3. Select the review booklet “Group Financial Statements”

4. Click on “Copy”

5. Enter the name of your specialized Review Booklet and click on ‘Copy’

6. Click on ”Open Configuration”

7. On the next screen you’ll see the configuration steps, so let’s see each of them in detail.

 

  • Note: If you make any changes, such as deletion, change, extension you can always check whether the performed action didn't make the booklet inconsistent. To do so, just click on the button “Check”. In case there's any inconsistency, you can quickly correct them based on the error message.
  • Tab General: Here you can enter the general details of the specialized review booklet, like name and description.

  • Tab Analytical Queries: In this page, you can decide which analytical query you'd like to include in your specialized review booklet. Let’s take an example and assume you'd like to see only the Balance Sheet and Cash Flow relevant items, so let’s delete all the others.
    • To do you, you need to go first to the tab “Business Pages” and delete all pages that were referenced by the Analytical Query. for example: Profit & Loss (Function of Expense) -> Business page to be deleted: Profit & Loss (Function of Expense) -> Select this line and click on “Delete”.
    • Note: If you delete the unnecessary analytical queries and the related business pages, you need to make sure there are no remaining entries on the tab “Navigation”. You need to delete the references from this tab too. If there's any data provider with an empty name, it’s a good sign that the underlying analytical query was already deleted. So, you need to remove this one as well.
    • Tip: You can further customize the analytical queries by choosing which columns, rows, and standard filters you would like to see by default. See the details here.

  • Tab Business Pages: Regardless of the delete function you have the opportunity to further enhance which pages you would like to make as visible and default. Also, you can add new page groups.

  • Tab Variables: In this section, you can customize which variables you would like to set as default parameters and decide whether such parameters will be visible, hidden, or visible in adapt filters. You're able to maintain variables on a booklet and page level as well.

  • Tab Groups: You can select variable groups and groupings of column sets and row sets for the multi-combo boxes on the business pages. You can also add filter dimensions and further entries.

  • Tab Formatting: If you would like to influence how the decoration lines will appear you can achieve it by using the predefined semantic styles.

  • Tab Navigation: Here you can define the navigation targets on booklet, data provider, and field level. As mentioned earlier, this tab have to be also adjusted if you may delete any analytical queries or business pages.

  • Would you like to see more about these configuration steps? Check out the details on the SAP Help.

8. Once you finished your customizings describes in step 7 you can have a final check on your report to make sure the everything is consistent. Click on “Check” and if there are no errors you can continue with the button “Save Final”.

9. You're now about to leave the configuration and continue with the creation of the application.

10. You need to define the name of your tile and a short description. The definition of the semantic object is also required to make sure that you can find this specialized application when you search it. Hint: You can use the same semantic object as it was defined for the standard Group Financial Statement Review Booklet (ConsolidationFinStatement). If you're done, you can continue with “Save and Publish”.

11. As a next step you need to create a business catalog to your booklet. It's needed to assign it to targeted users and all users who are assigned to the selected business catalog will be able to see and run this booklet.

12. Now, you're ready to publish your specialized review booklet by selecting the “Publish” button. It usually takes some time (10–15 minutes) once the status will be “published” but after that your specialized review booklet is ready to use.

 

More information

  • SAP S/4HANA for group reporting
  • Review Booklet on SAP Community
  • Review Booklet on our help portal
  • Review Booklet Designer

entry.title: Sorting in Editable smart table
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

We have a editable smart table with a button to mass maintain values for a column based on some calculation . the user is trying to sort the column before saving , however the sorting is not considering the values entered by the users. 

the data is refreshed and sorted as per the values in the database . 

what is missing so that it considers the entered values to sort the column in table ?

 

Thanks ,

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Message processing status "Retry" for failed messages
entry.content:
Hello

I have a query on the "Retry" message processing status in Cloud Integration.

When messages polled from Event Mesh using AMQP adapter fails due to some reason during the iflow processing in Cloud Integration, the messages end up in "Retry" status in the "Monitor Message Processing" view.  After the message is retried based on the configuration mentioned in Event Mesh Queue/AMQP adapter, the message should apparently go into "Failed" status but it remains in "Retry" status.

Is there an adjustment in configuration that can be done either at Event Mesh Queue or AMQP adapter, so that message processing status is displayed as "Failed" instead of "Retry" (screenshot below) ?

entry.title: 🎉 Let's celebrate! 25 Years of SAP University Alliances
entry.content:
Building Bridges, Expanding Horizons
25 Years SAP University Alliances

 

In the ever-evolving landscape of technology and education, there are significant moments that mark the beginning of transformative journeys. For SAP University Alliances, the story begins with a simple yet profound idea – the collaboration between academia and industry to empower the next generation of talent, which remains at the core of its mission to this day.

As we celebrate 25 years of bridging the gap between SAP and academia, it is crucial to reflect on our humble beginnings and the remarkable journey that has unfolded since.

Highlights and Milestones of SAP University Alliances

The origin of SAP University Alliances can be traced back to the early days of the SAP software, then known as SAP R/3. It started as a pull-initiative by lecturers who recognized the value of integrating SAP software into academic teaching. Their enthusiasm and vision laid the groundwork for what would become a vibrant, highly engaged community of educators and learners.

During those early stages, universities that partnered with SAP University Alliances initiated the installation of SAP R/3 software using servers and CDs. This process, although initially challenging, further established the groundwork for future developments. To simplify the installation process, universities in Germany and the United States started a grassroots movement to host SAP systems centrally. This pursuit not only improved the manageability of hosting but also facilitated broad adoption among academic institutions globally.

The turning point came in 1999 when, on the initiative of former SAP Executive Board member Gerhard Oswald, prior independent programs converged, and the centralized SAP University Alliances Program was officially announced at SAP Sapphire in Nice, France. This marked a significant milestone in our journey, as it brought together a global community dedicated to leveraging SAP technologies for academic purposes. Since then, the SAP University Alliances community has grown exponentially, offering tailored curricula for academic teaching and providing access to SAP systems via so called University Competence Centers (UCCs) and Academic Competence Centers (ACCs).

SAP University Alliances Community Meeting (UA-COM) 2023

The impact of SAP University Alliances' initiatives has always been profound and far-reaching. From the Asia Pacific, Japan, and China (APJC) to North America (NA), Latin America and the Caribbean (LAC), Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA), as well as Sub-Saharan Africa – universities around the world have embraced the program wholeheartedly. The program's portfolio has expanded to offer a variety of opportunities, including Academic Community Conferences, Train-the-Trainer workshops, and connections to the broader SAP ecosystem.

In many regions so called academic boards were established to serve as sounding boards for teaching offerings and curricula, setting new impulses for the program’s growth. Over time, SAP R/3 has transformed into SAP S/4HANA to teach Enterprise Resource Planning. As another advancement, the Young Thinkers Program was established providing initiatives tailored to schools, expanding the reach and relevance of SAP University Alliances even more. And to make latest innovations from SAP accessible to university students, cloud solutions from SAP like SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Integrated Business Planning, or SAP Build were made available for academic teaching, too. Early experimentation with AI in process automation and the introduction of sustainability offerings, like the ERPsim business simulation game and an upcoming EHS (environment, health, and safety) offering for teaching, further enhance the program’s scope and impact.

As we celebrate our milestones of building bridges and expanding horizons, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has been a part of this incredible journey. To the educators, students, partners, and stakeholders who have contributed to the success of SAP University Alliances, we say thank you. Your dedication, passion, and commitment have been the driving force behind our achievements.

SAP Academic Community Conference China 2017 / SAP Next-Gen 4 All Celebration 2023

Over the past 25 years, our mission remains as relevant as ever, continually evolving to meet the needs of the changing educational landscape. Today, we stand as a thriving community of over 2,700 educational institutions, united in our commitment to integrating SAP into classrooms and providing the next generation with the skills they need to thrive in the future. Together, we work to ensure that every student is prepared for the challenges and opportunities that lie ahead, enabling them to bring out their best.

Thank you, and here's to the next 25 years of SAP University Alliances!

entry.title: Re: How can I see the result of Email sending?
entry.content: Then What's the difference between "disabled" and "generate without setting"? Even if I choose "generate without setting", and set my email as admin, but I couldn't get any emails..

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Invites sent out as of 16 May 2024. Thanks for your interest everyone.

entry.title: Introduction with SAP Community
entry.content: Hello community! I'm very happy to join this group and be a part of this family where we can share our thoughts and communicate to each other.

entry.title: Re: How to create Mass Output Condition records in Sales...
entry.content: LSMW is your best bet and it's still there in S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Cross Landscape Distribution - Focused Build Standalone Extensions Part 1
entry.content:
@stefan_doktor I have one more question. Every time I run a distribution in Wizard I have to specify an open transport request in the target system. Is it possible to avoid this so that transport requests are created automatically?

With best regards,

Alexander

entry.title: HOW CAN I CONNECT SPRING BOOT JAVA 17 WITH SAP
entry.content:
Hello guys, I am new to SAP, I am currently developing a computer website which I have doubts regarding the connection with SAP through the Hana Studio database, I am using the maven repository to download the libraries through the pom .xml, now I would like to know what libraries I need to be able to connect to SAP and visualize, let's say, the data and then show it in a table, I currently have this library, I don't know if this is enough to be able to connect to the SAP platform to perform table queries and display them in my web application

Containt in pom.xml : 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"

xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"

xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">

<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

<parent>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>

<version>3.2.5</version>

<relativePath /> <!-- lookup parent from repository -->

</parent>

<groupId>com.battilana</groupId>

<artifactId>ProyectoSAP</artifactId>

<version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>

<name>ProyectoSAP</name>

<description>Proyecto de Estados SAP</description>

<properties>

<java.version>17</java.version>

</properties>

<dependencies>

<dependency>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>

</dependency>

<dependency>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf</artifactId>

</dependency>

<dependency>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>

</dependency>

<dependency>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>

</dependency>

 

<dependency>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-devtools</artifactId>

<scope>runtime</scope>

<optional>true</optional>

</dependency>

<dependency>

<groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>

<artifactId>lombok</artifactId>

<optional>true</optional>

</dependency>

<dependency>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>

<scope>test</scope>

</dependency>

<!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/com.sap.cloud.db.jdbc/ngdbc -->

<dependency>

<groupId>com.sap.cloud.db.jdbc</groupId>

<artifactId>ngdbc</artifactId>

<version>2.20.17</version>

<type>pom</type>

</dependency>

</dependencies>

 

<build>

<plugins>

<plugin>

<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>

<artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>

<configuration>

<excludes>

<exclude>

<groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>

<artifactId>lombok</artifactId>

</exclude>

</excludes>

</configuration>

</plugin>

</plugins>

</build>

 

</project>

 

Sorry for the long text, but I need to show everything so that you can see a detail in which version of Java I am doing it and version of Maven, I hope you can help me with this question I have and thank you very much.
